text: Did you see SCOTUS dropped the Section 8 portability ruling this morning? My entire housing docket just became a four-alarm fire. Happy Tuesday to me.
wait I saw the headline but didn't read it — how bad is it
Bad. Families we represent in Syracuse can't transfer vouchers to follow jobs or better schools. Daniel's already drafted three emergency motions and it's not even noon.
is this going to be everywhere or just legal news
It's everywhere. Lorraine called me before yoga which means it's a five-alarm fire actually. She only calls before 7am for disasters.
your mentor calling at dawn is genuinely a unit of measurement I respect. what happens now
We file. I brief. Congress does nothing. The usual. At least the Corcoran kids will have questions for me at practice tonight — they follow this stuff more than you'd think.
field hockey players keeping up with housing law, sure why not. text me when you surface from the briefs
Grandma, did you see Linda shared that photo of the old Armory Street house on Facebook? I'm in court all week but still somehow the family archivist 😂
Mom did you see Lorraine posted that article about legal aid funding cuts in upstate NY? You should comment, she'd love to hear from you.
Dad did you see Lorraine posted that photo from our Legal Aid gala? Commented 'proud of my girls' — she means me AND the firm, which, fair.
Did you see Lorraine's post? She's retiring after 31 years at legal aid. I know I'm supposed to be happy for her but honestly Syracuse is cooked without her 😬
Did you see Daniel's post about the Albany landlord-tenant ruling? Debating whether I should weigh in — feels like a bad idea before we file ours in Syracuse but he's not wrong.
Did you see Lorraine's post about the housing ruling? I left a comment but 'congratulations' felt embarrassing — that case ran longer than some marriages.

Saw your post about the housing displacement numbers — that tracks exactly with what we're seeing at Keystone. Send it to Daniel Porter, he's been building an eviction defense case around this for months.
Did you see Emma's post about the new apartment in Albany? I commented 'downgrade from Syracuse' and now she's left me on read for two hours 😂 Daniel thinks I should apologize.
Saw your post about the food truck rally downtown — took me a full minute to realize that was Syracuse and not some city that actually has its life together 😂 We should go Saturday after my yoga.
Emma posted something about self-care burnout and I left a comment that was maybe too... lawyer-y. She texted me laughing so I think we're fine, but still.
Did you see SCOTUS dropped the Section 8 portability ruling this morning? My entire housing docket just became a four-alarm fire. Happy Tuesday to me.
